$description: Machine-readable reference for automating Z AI (z-ai-web-dev-sdk) setup in CosmoGov. Human instructions: ai-api-configuration.md

sdk.apiShape: OpenAI-style chat: POST {baseUrl}/chat/completions with Authorization: Bearer {apiKey}

configPriority: 1. Environment variables (best for Vercel / CI): Z_AI_BASE_URL + Z_AI_API_KEY required together
2. Else: JSON file .z-ai-config in order — project root (cwd), $HOME, /etc (SDK default)

Z_AI_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Z AI API (no trailing path; SDK appends /chat/completions).

code.openAICompatible: src/lib/ai-completions.ts — export chatCompletionsCreate(); used by /api/ai/* when URL is NVIDIA integrate or Z_AI_USE_OPENAI_COMPAT=1

nvidiaOpenAI.notes: Do not commit nvapi keys. Use env / Vercel only.

vercel.note: Set secrets in Vercel Project Settings → Environment Variables. Do not commit .z-ai-config with real keys.
